dashboard.label: Detection Efficacy
dashboard.description: Proves detection value: technique coverage %, mean time to detect (MTTD), and kill-chain completeness for OrchestraACME campaigns.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | stats dc(technique_id) as observed | appendcols [| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | stats count as expected] | eval coverage_pct=round(100*observed/expected,1) | fields coverage_pct

`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ (workflow.blocked=true OR defenseclaw_blocked=true OR codeguard_blocked=true) | stats avg(gen_ai.client.operation.duration_ms) as avg_ms | eval mttd_sec=round(avg_ms/1000,2) | fields mttd_sec

`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ incident_id=* | stats dc(framework.kill_chain_stage) as stages_seen values(framework.kill_chain_stage) as stages by incident_id | eval completeness=if(stages_seen>=3,"HIGH",if(stages_seen>=2,"MEDIUM","LOW")) | sort - stages_seen
`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ workflow.blocked=true OR workflow.block_reason=* | stats count by workflow.block_reason

`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ campaign_week=* | lookup acme_campaign_weeks_lookup campaign_week OUTPUT theme attack_class workflow_surface expected_block_layer | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen values(workflow.block_reason) as block_reasons by campaign_week theme attack_class workflow_surface expected_block_layer | sort campaign_week
